title: myroxylon ellipticum
intro: Myroxylon ellipticum, also known as Palo Santo, is a plant species native to Central and South America. It is renowned for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Palo Santo include reducing stress and anxiety, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. Palo Santo can be prepared into various herbal products, such as essential oils, tinctures, and incense sticks, which can be used for aromatherapy and to promote relaxation.
